subcodes.first_line: O offspring of that noble personage! The first and second letters arrived, and their contents became known and clear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص جلیل نامه اول و ثانی رسید و تفاصیل معلوم و واضح گردید
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
